title: licaria cannella subsp. tenuicarpa
intro: Licaria cannella subsp. tenuicarpa, also known as Licaria tenuicarpa, is a species of plant native to Central and South America. It is a type of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Lauraceae and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as provide relief from digestive issues and skin irritations. Licaria tenuicarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
